title: Campaign Integrity Layer — Phase 5
consumer_purpose: Build the integrity layer that makes agent work ruthlessly inspectable, recoverable, and honest — single canonical campaign truth model, evidence-gated push, review compression, process auditor, safe stop/resume, campaign replay, precise done semantics
claim_atoms: Review compression system produces review manifest per campaign
Evidence-gated push blocks until all binders closed
Safe stop/resume preserves context across restart/crash
Campaign replay reconstructs full timeline from events
Done semantics use 8 precise state classifications
content:
{
  "schema": "rig.relay.phase_plan.v1",
  "plan_revision": 1,
  "phase": {
    "id": "campaign-integrity-phase-5",
    "name": "Campaign Integrity & Truth Infrastructure",
    "depends_on": ["desktop-reliability-phase-4", "PG-001"],
    "admission_condition": "Phase 4 reliability infrastructure (safe mode, event taxonomy, secrets, plugin security) foundation built and verified"
  },
  "context_summary": "The reliability layer (Phase 4) ensures the app doesn't crash or leak secrets. The integrity layer (Phase 5) ensures the developer can trust what the tool is doing — that every action is inspectable, recoverable, and provably honest. Five standards: (1) safer than manual — stop/resume/revert trivial, (2) more legible than a human team — air-traffic-control surface, (3) punishes bullshit — hostile to fake completion, (4) cheap interruption — preserve mental state, (5) compress review pain — show what needs human attention. Core mechanism: single canonical campaign truth model with event-sourced state. Everything else (UI, agent context, analytics, binders, reports) is a projection.",
  "workstreams": [
    {
      "id": "IN-001",
      "title": "Canonical Campaign Truth Model",
      "priority": 1,
      "effort": "high",
      "description": "Single authoritative event-sourced state for every campaign: lanes, role runs, claims, plans, reviews, edits, validations, red-team findings, repairs, checkpoints, audit verdicts, integration status, push status. Everything else is a projection. Builds on existing RuntimeEvent schema and event-store infrastructure. Survives app restart and process crash.",
      "depends_on": []
    },
    {
      "id": "IN-002",
      "title": "Review Compression System",
      "priority": 1,
      "effort": "moderate",
      "description": "Show the developer what they actually need to review, not every changed line. Weighted review surface: mechanical rename = low, generated file = hidden, security boundary = high, IPC bridge = high, test-only = medium, diff not in plan = high, code changed after validation = critical. Produce a review manifest per campaign.",
      "depends_on": ["IN-001"]
    },
    {
      "id": "IN-003",
      "title": "Evidence-Gated Push",
      "priority": 1,
      "effort": "moderate",
      "description": "Push must feel earned. Gates: every lane binder closed, integration validation passed, all red-team findings closed or waived, audit checks satisfied, no dirty files. Push produces verifiable record linking commits to lane binders.",
      "depends_on": ["IN-001"]
    },
    {
      "id": "IN-004",
      "title": "Process Auditor",
      "priority": 2,
      "effort": "moderate",
      "description": "Detect protocol violations by auditing event chronology: executor without approved plan, validation before last edit, red-team finding ignored, historian committed dirty files, critic skipped. Block progression until resolved.",
      "depends_on": ["IN-001", "IN-003"]
    },
    {
      "id": "IN-005",
      "title": "Safe Stop/Resume",
      "priority": 2,
      "effort": "moderate",
      "description": "One-click answers to: where were we? what was the last good state? what is safe to continue? what is stale? Context preserved across app restart. Campaign replay reconstructs full timeline.",
      "depends_on": ["IN-001"]
    },
    {
      "id": "IN-006",
      "title": "Precise Done Semantics",
      "priority": 3,
      "effort": "low",
      "description": "The system must be hostile to fake completion. Done classifications: plan-drafted, patch-applied, targeted-tests-passed, red-team-passed-but-validation-skipped, committed-without-integration, campaign-complete. UI never shows bare 'done'.",
      "depends_on": ["IN-001"]
    }
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Campaign replayable from events: scouts, plans, critics, edits, validations, repairs all visible",
    "Review manifest provides 70%+ reduction in review burden",
    "Push blocked if lane binder open, validation failed, or red-team finding unresolved",
    "Kill app mid-campaign → restart → resume → context restored in < 10 seconds",
    "Process auditor detects all 5 protocol violations in automated tests",
    "Done always shows specific classification, never bare 'done'",
    "Every failure traces to lane/role/event/commit within 3 clicks"
  ],
  "deferred_seams": [
    "Campaign replay UI — deferred until truth model stabilizes",
    "External file edit collision detection — deferred to coordination hardening phase"
  ]
}
